name: inner-excellence
description: Jim Murphy's 'Inner Excellence: Train Your Mind for Extraordinary Performance and the Best Possible Life' — a comprehensive guide to mental toughness, poise under pressure, and inner transformation, drawing on sports psychology, Samurai philosophy, and Christian spirituality to help you perform at your peak while living a life of deep contentment, joy, and confidence.
useCase: Developing mental toughness and poise under pressure, overcoming fear and self-doubt, cultivating focus and presence, building unshakeable beliefs, and aligning your inner world for peak performance and fulfillment.
knownRisks: Strongly Christian framework — may not resonate with non-religious readers
Some concepts may feel contradictory (surrender vs ambition)
Written for competitive athletes — some examples may not transfer to other fields
The author's personal experience is from baseball — sports-specific
